title: Editor Loads with Rich Text Editor Features
description: Verify that the editor page loads correctly with all core rich text editing features including headings, lists, text styles, text alignment, and inline images support.

steps.description: Navigate to the authenticated Editor Page
Check that the rich text editor loads successfully
Insert headings, multiple list types, apply various text styles (bold, italic, underline), change text alignment (left, center, right, justify), and insert inline images
Verify that all inserted elements are rendered correctly in the editor

title: Typing Speed Analytics Display and Integrity Status Updates
description: Ensure that the editor calculates typing speed (words per minute) over sliding windows accurately and updates the integrity status indicator chip with appropriate color-coded feedback in real-time.

steps.description: Start typing continuously in the editor for a duration sufficient to calculate WPM
Check that the typing speed analytics engine updates the typing speed calculation dynamically
Verify the integrity status chip changes color based on predefined speed thresholds (e.g., green for normal, yellow for slowed typing)
Pause typing and then resume typing at a fast speed
Ensure the status chip updates promptly to reflect changes in typing speed

title: Paste Event Detection and Integrity Feedback
description: Validate that paste events into the editor are detected in real-time locally and cause the integrity status indicator chip to display a paste alert with corresponding color feedback.

steps.description: Copy text from external source
Paste the copied text into the editor
Verify that the paste event is detected locally without external data transmission
Check that the integrity status chip displays a color-coded alert indicating the paste event

title: Export Document to DOCX with Formatting and Images Preserved
description: Test that exporting a composed document to DOCX format produces a file that retains headings, lists, text styles, alignments, and inline images with greater than 95% fidelity.

steps.description: Compose a test document in the editor with headings, various styled text, bullet and numbered lists, alignments, and embedded inline images
Trigger document export in DOCX format
Open the exported DOCX file and verify that all formatting elements and images appear with >95% fidelity compared to the editor view

title: Export Document to PDF with Formatting and Images Preserved
description: Validate that exporting a composed document to PDF format through server-side conversion produces a file retaining the original formatting, layout, and embedded images with greater than 95% fidelity.

steps.description: Create a sample document in the editor that includes headings, lists, styled text, alignments, and inline images
Export the document to PDF format
Verify the PDF output matches the editor document with >95% fidelity in formatting and images

title: Privacy Verification of Behavioral Analytics Data Collection
description: Confirm that the behavioral analytics engine operates locally within the client and that no sensitive content or keystroke data is transmitted or stored externally, ensuring privacy compliance.

steps.description: Use network monitoring tools while typing and pasting in the editor
Assert that no sensitive data such as full text input or keystroke logs are sent to any external servers
Confirm only aggregate metrics like typing speed and paste event flags are locally computed and stored

title: Responsive Design on Desktop and Tablet
description: Verify that the editor interface and functionality are fully responsive and consistent when accessed on desktop and tablet devices, maintaining usability and formatting integrity.

steps.description: Access the editor page using desktop browser and tablet device/browser
Check layout adapts appropriately to different screen sizes without UI element overlap or overflow
Edit or create a document on both devices including text styles and images
Verify consistent document formatting and editor feature availability on both form factors

title: Distraction-Free User Interface During Timed Writing
description: Ensure that the editor UI presents a minimal, distraction-free environment optimized for academic timed writing scenarios, hiding non-essential elements and focusing on writing tools.

steps.description: Open the editor page and begin timed writing session
Verify that UI hides or minimizes non-critical buttons, sidebars, and notifications
Ensure the integrity status chip is present but unobtrusive with clear color-coded feedback

title: Integration of Integrity Status Chip with Real-time Behavioral Signals
description: Test that the integrity status chip accurately integrates typing speed and paste event alerts to provide continuous and clear feedback during essay composition.

steps.description: Compose text in editor at varied speeds
Perform paste events at different intervals
Check the integrity chip reflects speed changes and alerts immediately with appropriate color changes

title: Editor Performance with Large Document and Multiple Images
description: Verify that the editor remains smooth, responsive, and functional when handling documents with a large amount of text and multiple embedded images.

steps.description: Create a large document inside the editor (e.g., >10,000 words) with multiple (5+) inline images
Perform normal editing operations: typing, deleting, styling text
Confirm the editor is responsive without noticeable lag or freeze during all operations

title: User Can Log Out and Forced Access Denied to Editor
description: Ensure that when a user logs out, they are properly redirected and cannot access the editor page without re-authentication.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to the editor page
Click on the logout button
Check user is redirected to the Home Page or Login Page
Attempt to access editor page URL directly post logout
Verify access is denied or redirected to login requiring authentication

title: Export Pipeline Handles Complex Layouts Correctly
description: Test that the export pipeline for both DOCX and PDF formats correctly preserves complex layouts including nested lists, mixed alignments, and embedded images.

steps.description: Create sample document with nested bullet and numbered lists, mixed text alignments, varied font styles, and multiple images
Export document to DOCX and PDF
Verify that both exported DOCX and PDF files correctly reflect the complex layout and formatting with high fidelity
